name: maigret
description: 🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites
readme_summary: Maigret is a Python-based tool designed to collect extensive information about a person solely by their username. It scans over 3,000 websites, extracting available data from profiles and APIs, and can perform recursive searches for a comprehensive digital dossier.
key_features: Supports 3,000+ sites with filtering by tags (categories, countries)
Embeddable in Python projects for programmatic use
Extracts all available information from profile pages and site APIs
Performs recursive search using discovered usernames and IDs
Detects and partially bypasses blocks, censorship, and CAPTCHA
Fetches an auto-updated site database
Works with Tor and I2P websites
Includes a web interface for browsing results as a graph
Optional AI analysis mode for investigation summaries
primary_use_case: Gathering open-source intelligence (OSINT) on individuals by collecting information from various online platforms using only a username.
cover_image_prompt: A digital detective, depicted as a wise owl with glowing cybernetic eyes, sits at a console overflowing with interconnected data streams. The owl is actively sifting through a cascade of glowing usernames and profile icons, each representing a different social media platform or website. From the console, a detailed, holographic dossier materializes, showcasing a person's digital footprint like a constellation. Subtle elements like small screens displaying code snippets and a magnifying glass hovering over a username connect the metaphor to the tool's function. The scene is set in a dimly lit, futuristic library, with a cool blue and green color palette. 3D isometric illustration style, highly detailed, cinematic lighting.

name: gpt_image_2_skill
description: GPT Image 2 prompt gallery, image prompt library, agentic skill, and CLI for OpenAI image generation/editing
readme_summary: This repository provides a curated gallery of prompts for OpenAI's GPT Image 2, serving as a prompt library and an agentic skill. It also includes a Command Line Interface (CLI) for image generation and editing, designed for use with skill-capable agent runtimes.
key_features: GPT Image 2 prompt gallery and library
Agentic skill for AI agents (e.g., Claude Code, Codex)
CLI for image generation and editing
Reusable prompts for various use cases (research figures, UI mockups, etc.)
Focus on curated examples for quality and demonstration
primary_use_case: To provide a collection of effective prompts and an integrated toolset (CLI and agent skill) for generating and editing images using OpenAI's GPT Image 2 model.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan in a vibrant, futuristic workshop, holding a magical brush that transforms simple text scrolls into stunning, diverse visual artworks. One side of the workshop displays a library of intricately designed prompt scrolls, while the other showcases a digital canvas where images for research figures, game interfaces, and artistic photography are materializing. Subtle holographic interfaces with code snippets and image previews float around, indicating the underlying AI and CLI functionality. The overall mood is creative and empowering, with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette emphasizing innovation and artistry. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft, glowing lighting.

name: girl-agent
description: ИИ-девушка с человеческим поведением: сон, настроение, расписание, память, стадии отношений и конфликты. Userbot mode через MTProto — реагирует, печатает, ставит реакции. Anti-AI промпт убирает ChatGPT-повадки. Не чат-бот — персонаж с состоянием.
readme_summary: Girl-Agent is a TypeScript-based AI character designed to simulate human-like conversational behavior, including sleep, mood, scheduling, memory, and relationship dynamics. It aims to avoid typical AI chatbot patterns by implementing an anti-AI prompt and operating as a character with a distinct state, rather than a simple response generator.
key_features: Human-like behavior simulation (sleep, mood, schedule, memory, relationships, conflicts)
Anti-AI prompt to remove ChatGPT-like responses
Userbot mode via MTProto for real-time interaction (reactions, typing, replies)
Character with internal state, not just a response bot
Cross-platform installation via curl script (Linux, macOS, WSL) with Docker or local Node.js
Native desktop client for Windows using Rust (iced)
Docker support for server environments with headless operation
primary_use_case: To provide a conversational AI companion that exhibits complex, human-like behaviors and states, offering a more realistic and engaging interaction than traditional chatbots.
cover_image_prompt: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a young woman sitting at a desk, surrounded by subtle digital elements. She is not actively typing but is looking thoughtfully at a small, glowing screen displaying a simplified calendar and a mood indicator (e.g., a happy or tired face). Beside her, a cup of coffee is steaming, and a soft lamp casts a warm glow, suggesting she's 'resting' or 'busy'. Faint, abstract data streams flow around her, representing her 'memory' and 'schedule'. The repository name 'girl-agent' is subtly integrated into a decorative element on the desk. The overall mood is cozy and introspective, emphasizing her 'state' rather than constant activity. Style: 3D isometric illustration with soft, painterly textures and a warm color palette.

name: cc-switch
description: A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Gemini CLI & Hermes Agent. Only official website: ccswitch.io
readme_summary: CC Switch is a cross-platform desktop application designed to manage and integrate various AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent. It serves as an all-in-one interface for interacting with these different AI models, simplifying provider management and offering WSL support.
key_features: Cross-platform desktop application (Windows, macOS, Linux)
All-in-One manager for multiple AI coding assistants
Supports Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent
Provider management
WSL support
Built with Tauri
primary_use_case: To provide a unified and user-friendly desktop interface for managing and interacting with multiple AI coding assistants, simplifying developer workflows.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled conductor standing at a podium, orchestrating a symphony of diverse AI assistants represented as distinct musical instruments (e.g., a robotic cello for Codex, a glowing flute for Claude Code, a futuristic keyboard for Gemini CLI). The conductor's baton, subtly shaped like the CC Switch logo, directs streams of code and data flowing from the instruments into a central, harmonious output displayed on a large, ethereal screen. The scene is a modern, minimalist concert hall with subtle digital particle effects and glowing UI elements integrated into the environment. The overall mood is one of seamless integration and powerful control. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, vibrant color palette and high detail.

name: learn-claude-code
description: Bash is all you need -  A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1
readme_summary: This repository provides a foundational "harness" for building AI agents, emphasizing that true agency stems from the underlying AI model rather than code orchestration. It serves as an educational tool to teach developers how to construct the necessary infrastructure around an AI model to create a functional agent product.
key_features: Teaches the concept of agent harnesses
Explains the origin of agency in AI models
Provides a framework for building agent products
Educational resource for AI agent development
primary_use_case: To educate developers on building the infrastructure (harness) around AI models to create functional AI agents.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan meticulously assembling a complex clockwork automaton. The automaton's 'brain' is a glowing, intricate neural network core, representing the AI model. The artisan is using tools and blueprints that subtly resemble code and UI elements, symbolizing the 'harness' being built around the model. Gears and wires connect the core to the automaton's limbs, showing the flow of agency. The background is a clean, bright workshop with subtle digital particles and the repository name 'learn-claude-code' etched on a blueprint. The overall mood is one of creation and empowerment, illustrating how the harness enables the model's agency. 3D isometric illustration style with a focus on clear, understandable components and a bright, optimistic color palette.

name: deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
readme_summary: DeerFlow is an open-source super agent harness designed for long-horizon tasks. It orchestrates sub-agents, memory, and sandboxes, powered by extensible skills, to research, code, and create complex outputs over extended periods.
key_features: Super Agent Harness
Sub-agents orchestration
Memory management
Sandbox environments
Extensible skills and tools
Long-horizon task handling
Claude Code Integration
InfoQuest integration
primary_use_case: Orchestrating complex, long-running AI agent workflows for research, coding, and content creation.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, multi-armed conductor standing at a grand console, orchestrating a symphony of diverse AI agents. Each agent, represented by a unique musical instrument or robotic entity, performs a specific task like coding (a keyboard), research (a magnifying glass), or creation (a paintbrush). Glowing threads of data connect the conductor to each agent, showing the flow of information and commands. In the background, a complex, evolving digital landscape represents the long-horizon task being completed. Subtle UI elements and code snippets are visible on the console screens. The scene is set in a futuristic, organized control room with a vibrant, dynamic color palette. Rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with high detail and a sense of intricate collaboration.
